Home / Services / Garage Door Repair

Garage Door Repair

Fast and reliable garage door repair services in Albuquerque, NM.

A malfunctioning garage door can be a major inconvenience and a security risk. Doors on Fourth provides prompt and reliable garage door repair services throughout Albuquerque and the surrounding areas. Our skilled technicians are equipped to handle a wide range of issues, from broken springs and cables to malfunctioning openers and damaged panels.

We understand the importance of a properly functioning garage door, especially in Albuquerque's climate. Our repair services address common problems caused by extreme temperatures, dust, and monsoon season moisture. We use high-quality replacement parts and proven techniques to ensure lasting repairs.

Whether you're dealing with a door that won't open, a noisy opener, or a broken spring, we'll diagnose the problem quickly and provide an efficient solution. We offer emergency repair services for urgent situations, ensuring your home is secure and your garage door is back in operation as soon as possible. Count on Doors on Fourth for expert garage door repair services you can trust.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Diagnostic assessment of the problem.
  2. 02 Step 2: Transparent explanation of the repair options.
  3. 03 Step 3: Efficient and effective repairs using quality parts.
  4. 04 Step 4: Testing and verification to ensure proper function.

Benefits

  • Improved safety and security
  • Extended garage door lifespan
  • Reduced noise and smoother operation
  • Prevention of further damage

Frequently Asked Questions

How much does a garage door repair cost?

The cost of a garage door repair varies depending on the nature and extent of the problem. We offer free estimates, and we'll provide a detailed breakdown of the costs before starting any work. Our prices are competitive and transparent, with no hidden fees.

How quickly can you repair my garage door?

We understand that a broken garage door can be a major inconvenience, so we strive to provide prompt service. In many cases, we can schedule a repair appointment within 24 hours. For emergency situations, we offer same-day service.

What types of garage doors do you repair?

We repair all types of garage doors, including sectional doors, roll-up doors, and tilt-up doors. We also repair all major brands of garage door openers, including LiftMaster, Chamberlain, and Genie. No matter what type of garage door you have, we have the expertise to fix it.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with garage door repair? Contact us today.
